tracks.rawText: 2:58Amstex - Shantav5.5CoverEpic cinematic psytrance track at 145 BPM with powerful prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, Highly rhythmic, hypnotic and energetic with long, evolving and emotional loops that build intensity over time, Dominant and expressive ancient prehispanic flutes like quena and ocarina, with powerful melodic leads, fast arpeggios, call-and-response phrases and rich layered harmonies, Deep rolling psytrance bassline and punchy kick driving the track forward, Strong tribal percussion including huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Add cinematic choir elements with wide, atmospheric, emotional and epic vocal layers, creating a sacred and transcendental feeling, Rich psychedelic sound design with delays, reverbs and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind, mystical textures and ritual chanting elements, The track should feel like a massive ancient ceremony turned into a cinematic experience, magical, epic, spiritual, hypnotic and full of energy, with powerful emotional2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Amstex - Shanta

tracks.rawText: 8:00Amstex - Shanta [2314698065]UploadPsytrance with traditional Indian Vedic chanting, The track features a driving 140 BPM tempo in the key of G minor, A heavy, rolling triplet bassline locks with a punchy, compressed kick drum, High-frequency percussion includes sharp open hi-hats on the off-beats and rapid 16th-note closed hi-hat patterns, A male vocal performs Sanskrit shlokas with a dry, centered mix during the verses, transitioning to heavily processed, gated vocal chops in the transitions, Synthesizers include resonant acid-style squelches, rhythmic sawtooth stabs with short decay, and wide cinematic pads that swell during the breakdown, The arrangement uses classic psytrance builds with rising white noise snares and pitch-shifted synth risers leading into high-energy drops characterized by aggressive, staccato lead lines and complex rhythmic gating4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Amstex - Shanta [2314698065]

tracks.rawText: 3:26Flor de Amanecerv5.5Corrido tumbado with requinto lead in syncopated arpeggios, tololoche-style bass reinforced by 808 sub, and tight trap hats splitting the grid with swung ghost notes, Norteño bajo sexto, muted guitarrón, sparse snare, and spacey delay throws, Word-punch phrasing rides off-beat, with airy vocal doubles and brief brass stabsPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:21Dubiletv5.5Coverflamenco, acoustic guitar fingerpicking, rasgueado bursts, golpe percussion, nylon-string guitar harmonics, cajón accents, palmas claps, deep frame drum, stereo room reverb, tape saturation, dynamic breakdowns, verse-drop build, fiery urgency, dusk longing, 96 BPM, 12/8 compás, mandolin counterlines, reverb-drenched oud, dry close-mic plucks, high-energy beats3PublishRemix
